effect.name: GPS Text
effect.description: Overlay GPS-related text onto the video.
effect.author: Daniel F

parameter.name: argument
Text
parameter.comment: See the online documentation about additional qualifiers
parameter.paramlistdisplay: GPS latitude,GPS longitude,GPS altitude,GPS speed,Total distance so far,Date and time of current GPS point,Date and time of current frame in video file,Heart rate,Current GPS bearing,Current GPS direction,Total GPS altitude gain so far,Total GPS altitude loss so far,Total distance travelled uphill so far,Total distance travelled downhill so far,Total distance travelled on flat area so far,(Bike) cadence (in revs per minute),Ambient temperature,Power in watts,Gradient of GPS track,Gradient of GPS track in degrees

parameter.name: speed_multiplier
Speed multiplier
parameter.comment:
If the video file is a timelapse
(or slow motion), use this value to set the speed up/slow down ratio.
Sample values: 30 for 30x timelapse, 0.25 for 4x slow motion footage.

parameter.name: updates_per_second
Updates per second
parameter.comment:
Controls how many times per second
is the GPS text updated on video (interpolated).
A value of 0 will only update text when a real gps point has been recorded. Can be used in combination with speed_multiplier.

parameter.name: gps_start_text
GPS start time
parameter.comment: Date and time of the first valid GPS point.

parameter.name: video_start_text
Video start time
parameter.comment: Date and time of the video file.

parameter.name: auto_gps_offset_start
Auto offset start
parameter.comment: Provides a helper offset to guarantee start of video file syncs with the start of GPS file. Correctly sets the offset if video file and GPS recording was started at the same time.

parameter.name: auto_gps_offset_now
Auto offset now
parameter.comment: Provides a helper offset to sync the first GPS point to current video time (it is updated every second). Correctly sets the offset if your video record the moment GPS starts.

parameter.name: auto_gps_processing_start_now
Auto offset now
parameter.comment: Provides a helper offset to sync the first GPS point to current video time (it is updated every second). Correctly sets the offset if your video record the moment GPS starts.

parameter.name: geometry
Graph rectangle
parameter.comment:
Defines the rectangle that the graph should be drawn in.
Format is: "X Y W H". X, Y, W, H are assumed to be pixel units unless they have the suffix '%'.

parameter.name: family
<u>Font</u> Family
parameter.comment: The typeface of the font.

parameter.name: size
Size
parameter.comment: The size in pixels of the font.

parameter.name: weight
Weight
parameter.comment: The weight of the font.

parameter.name: style
Style
parameter.comment: The style of the font.

parameter.name: fgcolour
Foreground Color
parameter.comment: Foreground color

parameter.name: bgcolour
Background Color
parameter.comment: Background color

parameter.name: olcolour
Outline Color
parameter.comment: Outline color

parameter.name: outline
Outline Width
parameter.comment: The width of the outline in pixels

parameter.name: underline
Underline
parameter.comment: Apply underline decoration to the text.

parameter.name: strikethrough
Strikethrough
parameter.comment: Apply strikethrough decoration to the text.

parameter.name: halign
Horizontal Alignment
parameter.comment: Set the horizontal alignment

parameter.name: valign
Vertical Alignment
parameter.comment: Set the vertical alignment

parameter.name: opacity
Opacity
parameter.comment: Opacity of all elements - text, outline, and background
